The Fleet

Seven vehicles.
One standard.

From a Maserati sedan to a 45-passenger party bus — every vehicle is GPS-tracked, video-monitored, equipped with emergency kits, and maintained to perfection.

4 PAX
VIP Executive Sedan

Maserati Ghibli S

Twin-turbo Ferrari-built V6 with 424 horsepower. The statement vehicle for executives who want to arrive, not just show up.

  • 424hp twin-turbo V6
  • Premium leather interior
  • Harman Kardon sound
  • Phone charging
Book Maserati
6 PAX
Luxury SUV

Cadillac Escalade ESV

2025 model. The commanding presence of a full-size luxury SUV with room for your entire executive team and their luggage.

  • Extended wheelbase
  • Third-row seating
  • Premium entertainment
  • Ample cargo space
Book Cadillac
4 PAX
Compact Executive SUV

Audi Q3

German precision for shorter trips and airport transfers. Nimble in city traffic, comfortable on the highway.

  • Quattro AWD
  • Virtual cockpit
  • Compact yet spacious
  • Ideal for airports
Book Audi
14 PAX
Executive Sprinter

Mercedes-Benz Sprinter Limo

The CEO Sprinter. Full entertainment system, premium seating, perfect for corporate groups, tours, and bachelor/bachelorette parties.

  • WiFi enabled
  • Karaoke system
  • TV screens
  • Premium bar area
Book Mercedes-Benz
10 PAX
Classic Stretch Limousine

Chrysler 300 Stretch

The classic stretch experience. Karaoke, Xbox, Wii Mario Kart, Spotify, bar service, and nightclub lighting. Your party starts at pickup.

  • Karaoke system
  • Xbox/Wii gaming
  • Nightclub lighting
  • Full bar setup
Book Chrysler
45 PAX
Party Motor Coach

BCI Falcon Party Bus

The flagship. DJ booth, full bar, 50" TV screens, iPad-controlled entertainment with Alexa voice control, and a sound system that rivals downtown clubs.

  • DJ booth
  • 50" TV screens
  • iPad + Alexa control
  • Nightclub sound & lights
Book BCI
38 PAX
Luxury Mini Coach

Freightliner Grech Mini Coach

Corporate luxury for large groups. Eight TV screens, WiFi, premium seating, and the smooth ride of a purpose-built coach.

  • 8 TV screens
  • WiFi throughout
  • USB charging
  • Premium reclining seats
Book Freightliner
Downtown Cart

Greenville's only
city-approved $5 ride

Need a quick ride downtown? Our electric golf cart service covers Main Street end-to-end. Featured on FOX Carolina. The only low-speed vehicle approved by the City of Greenville for passenger transport.

$5 per person
5 passengers max
Request a Cart Ride Call or Text

Downtown Hospitality Packages

Hotels, restaurants, and apartment complexes — give your guests complimentary rides.

100 Tokens $400/mo
50 Tokens $225/mo
25 Tokens $120/mo
Hourly Rental $200/hr

Not sure which vehicle?
We'll help you choose.

Tell us the occasion, group size, and route. We'll match you with the perfect ride.

Get a Custom Quote
